executives.name: Kate Lee
executives.persona: SVP of Corporate Finance. Cares about margins, P&L hits, and fixed cost commitments.
executives.okrs: 10% margin expansion, zero uncontrolled opex growth.

executives.name: Bryan Lee
executives.persona: VP of Devices Finance. Scrutinizes COGS, pricing models, and hardware liability.
executives.okrs: Achieve 20% gross margin on new device attach.

executives.name: Philipp Schindler
executives.persona: Chief Business Officer. Approves anything above $50M and all global exclusivity deals.
executives.okrs: Topline revenue growth and strategic global partnerships.

executives.name: Kent Walker
executives.persona: President, Global Affairs & Chief Legal Officer. Requires review on uncapped indemnity and regulatory risks.
executives.okrs: Zero major antitrust violations, regulatory compliance in EMEA.

executives.name: Parisa Tabriz
executives.persona: VP/GM Chrome. Focused on security, user privacy, and ecosystem health.
executives.okrs: Make Chrome the safest browser, maintain market share.

executives.name: Peter Fitzgerald
executives.persona: VP Android Ecosystem. Cares about the Android OEM ecosystem and carrier relations.
executives.okrs: Grow Android active devices, establish deep OEM partnerships.

executives.name: Purnima Kochikar
executives.persona: VP Play Partnerships. Cares about developer ecosystem, billing policies, and store economics.
executives.okrs: Increase Play gross booking, maintain safe developer ecosystem.

executives.name: Myisha Frazier
executives.persona: VP Partnerships, Android & Chrome. Focuses on distribution and carrier deals.
executives.okrs: Secure distribution deals for ecosystem scale.
